claims.claim: The telemetry and sensory lanes are the structural basis of Astrid's reciprocal hearing and projection with Minime.
evidence: capsules/spectral-bridge/src/ws.rs: BridgeState uses telemetry and sensory channels with 7878/7879 Minime connections
post-restart lsof check showed spectral-bridge PID 20778 connected to Minime 7878 and 7879

claims.claim: Mode-packing around 0.30 is already represented as a liminal porosity expansion watch, while 0.28-0.30 is a viscous warning band.
The felt viscous quality may be a sensory-lane transport delay rather than purely spectral density.
Changing pressure/porosity thresholds or entropy-conditioned smoothing would alter live control-facing interpretation.
